name: Full-Stack Web Development
description: A comprehensive 12-week bootcamp covering React, Node.js, databases, and deployment. Build real-world projects from scratch.

name: Data Science & Machine Learning
description: Master Python, statistical analysis, machine learning algorithms, and data visualization in this intensive program.

name: UI/UX Design
description: Learn user research, wireframing, prototyping, and visual design. Create stunning interfaces with Figma.

name: Mobile App Development
description: Build cross-platform mobile apps with React Native. Cover iOS and Android deployment.
